title: Best Prime Day phone deals to buy now, says ZDNET expert.
body:
The wait is finally over for bargain hunters and tech enthusiasts alike, as Amazon's highly anticipated Prime Day has officially kicked off. This year's event promises to be a bonanza for those in the market for a new smartphone, with hundreds of dollars to be saved on some of the most sought-after devices. Among the top deals are significant discounts on flagship models from Google and Samsung, including the Google Pixel 10 Pro and Samsung Galaxy S26. With the event running from June 23 to June 26, shoppers can expect a flurry of exciting offers and promotions that are sure to tantalize even the most discerning consumers.

For those who have been holding out for the perfect moment to upgrade their mobile device, Prime Day 2026 is an opportunity that should not be missed. The discounts on offer are not limited to budget-friendly options, but also extend to high-end smartphones that are typically priced at a premium. This means that shoppers can now get their hands on the latest and greatest devices without breaking the bank. The Google Pixel 10 Pro, for instance, is renowned for its exceptional camera capabilities and sleek design, making it a top choice among photography enthusiasts and tech aficionados. Similarly, the Samsung Galaxy S26 boasts an impressive array of features, including a vibrant display and robust performance, cementing its position as a flagship device.

One of the most significant advantages of Prime Day is the ability for shoppers to snag incredible deals before the official event even begins. This year is no exception, with early smartphone deals already popping up well in advance of the June 23 kickoff. This strategy allows Amazon to build momentum and generate buzz around the event, giving shoppers a head start on their holiday shopping or simply treating themselves to a new device. Moreover, the extended period of discounts provides consumers with ample time to research and compare different models, ensuring that they make an informed purchasing decision.

The significance of Prime Day extends beyond the realm of individual shoppers, as it also has a profound impact on the broader tech industry. By offering deep discounts on popular devices, Amazon is able to drive sales and boost revenue for manufacturers, which can have a ripple effect throughout the entire supply chain. This, in turn, can lead to increased competition among device makers, resulting in improved product quality, innovative features, and better value for consumers. As the tech landscape continues to evolve at a rapid pace, events like Prime Day play a crucial role in shaping the market and influencing consumer behavior.

In addition to the discounts on individual devices, Prime Day also presents an opportunity for shoppers to explore emerging trends and technologies in the smartphone space. From 5G connectivity to artificial intelligence-powered cameras, the latest devices boast an array of innovative features that are redefining the mobile experience. By embracing these advancements, consumers can stay ahead of the curve and enjoy a more seamless, intuitive, and connected lifestyle. Whether you're a tech enthusiast or simply looking for a reliable device to stay in touch with loved ones, Prime Day 2026 has something for everyone.

As the event draws to a close on June 26, shoppers can expect a final flurry of deals and promotions that will make it even more difficult to resist the temptation of a new smartphone. With hundreds of dollars in savings up for grabs, it's an ideal time to treat yourself or gift a loved one with the latest device. As the dust settles on Prime Day 2026, one thing is certain – the world of smartphones will never be the same. With the pace of innovation showing no signs of slowing, consumers can look forward to an exciting future filled with cutting-edge devices, innovative features, and unparalleled value. As we look to the future, one thing is clear: the next generation of smartphones is just around the corner, and it's going to be bigger and better than ever.
